rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §32.303, which governs use of technology lending program grant funds by school districts and charter schools.
quote: A school district or open-enrollment charter school may use a grant awarded under Section 32.301 or other local funds to purchase, maintain, and insure equipment for a technology lending program.
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns technology lending program grants; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions. No overlap in subject matter.
